title: Po_core semantic_jump_human_review_decision v1
description: PR-018 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Records a human review DECISION (approved / rejected / needs_revision) against a semantic_jump_human_review_request -- it never executes a semantic jump, even when the decision is 'approved'. semantic_jump_executed, semantic_frame_changed, content_rewrite_applied, state_mutation_applied, safety_bypass_applied, and trace_reset_applied are all const false: this is human-review-gate only (read / verify / record_decision / trace / validate). See docs/contracts/SEMANTIC_JUMP_HUMAN_REVIEW_GATE_V1.md.

review_request_id.description: The semantic_jump_human_review_request.review_request_id this decision was recorded against.

decision.description: 'approved' is a human-review record for a future controlled executor -- it never executes a semantic jump in this PR. 'rejected' means this proposal does not proceed to any future execution. 'needs_revision' means the proposal must be revised or recreated before any future execution.

reviewer_type.description: 'test_fixture' is used by this PR's own test suite.

execution_authorized.description: A record for a FUTURE controlled executor only. Even when true (typically alongside decision='approved'), this PR never causes actual execution -- semantic_jump_executed remains const false regardless of this value.

semantic_jump_executed.description: This PR never executes a semantic jump, even when decision='approved' and execution_authorized=true. Always false.

semantic_frame_changed.description: This decision never changes the semantic frame. Always false.

content_rewrite_applied.description: This decision never rewrites content. Always false.

state_mutation_applied.description: This decision never mutates runtime state. Always false.

safety_bypass_applied.description: This decision never bypasses a safety gate. Always false.

trace_reset_applied.description: This decision never resets or deletes trace. Always false.

requires_followup.description: True is recommended (not enforced by schema) when decision='needs_revision'.

trace_refs.description: Must resolve to a SemanticJumpHumanReviewRequired event, directly or via ancestry -- enforced by TraceContinuityValidator, not expressible in JSON Schema.
